Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Shen is a participant in the decision-making process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Shen was present in the audience chamber without his golden stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Shen possesses city-destroying weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Shen wrestled a portal open using his mastery of space.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Shen is someone Yerin and Malice no longer need.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Shen is a potential advanced sacred artist inside the labyrinth of Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Shen projected orange energy from his sword.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Shen suggested tucking Mercy away in a void space.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Shen has a pale right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Shen's eyes are circles of white on pools of blackness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Shen wears black robes with a white badge on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Shen has black-and-white eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Shen's options had been reduced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Shen summoned a shield during the attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Shen's techniques threaten the lives of people living below Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Shen is addressed by the Void Sage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
